jsonLd.title: LIC is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, LIC in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About LIC:
LIC is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
